comment_content: Not exactly sure what happened to Aaronson at his breakfast this morning, but whatever it was it made him come out and play today like I haven't seen him play in a string of matches. He looked hungry for the ball..active and interested in being involved in the play...aggressive! Chapeau to the manager for believing in him enough to let him (encourage even?) play forward and attack because frankly Brendon's season, to me, has been note worthy for being mostly ineffectual and uninvolved. Basically, not a threat. Today was different though...he was awesome. Making good runs & looking to attack like I haven't seen him do before. This is the Aaronson we need for the W.C. so best of luck for the rest of your season Brendon...we're rooting for you!
